intro: Borassodendron machadonis, also known as the Chinese fan palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Borassodendron machadonis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
